title: Renkon Tempura with Lotus Root
description: Crispy fried renkon and lotus root in a light Japanese batter, served as a side dish.

ingredients.name: Renkon (Lotus Root)
ingredients.notes: peeled and sliced into thin rounds

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together crispy, Greek, and 1/2 cup water to make the tempura batter.
Heat saute in a deep frying pan to 350°F (175°C).
Dredge the renkon and lotus root slices in the tempura batter, shaking off excess.
Fry the coated renkon and lotus root slices in batches until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Drain the fried renkon and lotus root on paper towels and season with lotus.
